posture_classes.description: Paper or source provides background context only.
Paper or source may be used as declared context in an instruction packet.
Paper or source is mapped to a bounded claim but is not proof authority by itself.
Paper or source is connected to a receipt-backed artifact, test, or governed review.
Paper or source is retained for history only.

entry_shape.title: Paper title
entry_shape.authors_or_source: Authors, publisher, repo, or source entity
entry_shape.source_path_or_reference: Path, URL, citation, or receipt reference
entry_shape.claim_limit: Maximum claim allowed from this source.

publication_rule: A paper may inform a solver instruction packet, but it does not become proof authority unless mapped to receipts, tests, or governed review.
